emails.subject: RE: New York Power Authority
emails.body: Hi Tana....here's the latest add'l info. Can we get on this right away, so hopefully we can execute a transaction on Friday. Thanks. Forwarded by Janelle Scheuer/HOU/ECT on 09/20/2000 10:32 AM "Carey, Michael" <Michael.Carey@nypa.gov> on 09/20/2000 10:26:08 AM
